info.name: Returns the Filings Documents and Related Metadata Within Factset Coverage.

params.name: ids
params.description: Requested symbols or securities.  This is a comma-separated list with a maximum limit of 1000.  Each symbol can be a FactSet exchange symbol, CUSIP, or SEDOL.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start Date. Format is YYYYMMDD or relative +/- days (0,-1,etc).

params.name: endDate
params.description: End Date. Format is YYYYMMDD or relative +/- days (0,-1,etc).

params.name: paginationLimit
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: paginationOffset
params.description: Page number of the results to return.

params.name: timezone
params.description: Time zone to return story dates and times. Time zones are in POSIX format and automatically adjusted for daylight savings.

params.name: sort
params.description:
Sorting the results in chronological (oldest to newest) or reverse chronological (newest to oldest) order. 

 *  desc - sorting results in reverse chronological (descending) order. This is the default value if
    the sort parameter isnt used in the query
    
 *   asc - sorting results in chronological (ascending) order. If a start date is not specified, the
   API has a 10-year searching limitation.

params.name: sources
params.description: Code for document source to include.  This is a comma-separated list. Use the ```/helper``` endpoint to get the list of available sources.

params.name: categories
params.description:
Code for categories to include.  This is a comma-separated list. Use the ```/helper``` endpoint to get the list of available categories.

Default = All categories.

params.name: primaryId
params.description:
Type of identifier search
* Y - Returns headlines of stories that have the search ID(s) as the Primary ID.
* N - Returns headlines of stories that mention/refer to the ID(s).

params.name: searchText
params.description: Restricts the search to include only document stories which include the text searched.

params.name: formType
params.description: Restricts the search to include any form types of EDGAR.

params.name: accession
params.description: A unique identifier given to each EDGAR filings document. e.g. accession=0001013237-21-000069&sources=EDG

items.docs: Returns the filings documents within FactSet coverage along with other response fields

info.name: Factset Returns the Static Values for Various Parameters

items.docs: Returns the static values for sources,formTypes,timeZones,categories based on the specified parameter

info.name: Factset Returns the Count of Filings for Specified Source

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start Date. Format is YYYYMMDD or relative +/- days (0,-1,etc).

params.name: endDate
params.description: End Date. Format is YYYYMMDD or relative +/- days (0,-1,etc).

params.name: ids
params.description: Requested symbols or securities.  This is a comma-separated list with a maximum limit of 1000.  Each symbol can be a FactSet exchange symbol, CUSIP, or SEDOL.

params.name: sources
params.description: Code for document source to include.This is a comma-separated list. Use the ```/helper``` endpoint to get the list of available sources.

items.docs: Returns the count of filings documents along with other response fields.
